reviews.comment:
Esta estación de servicios me trae miles de recuerdos.de viajes hechos.con mis hijos pequeños. Los baños amplios, limpios a toda hora y la.buena onda de la gente era habitual, pero.nomse en qué parte del tiempo decayó  tanto. Qué ahora resulta un fantasma de lo que era. Baños sucios, que cobijan a varios perritos callejeros. El shop cerrado que da aspecto de abandonado. Le dan un aspecto a olvidado en el tiempo

(Translated by Google)
This gas station brings back so many memories of trips I took with my young children. The spacious, always clean restrooms and the friendly staff were the norm, but I don't know when it declined so much. Now it's a ghost of its former self. Dirty restrooms, sheltering several stray dogs. The closed shop, giving it an abandoned look. It all feels like it's been forgotten by time.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxaTZfbFlREAE

reviews.comment:

Baños impecables

(Translated by Google)
I always fill up at this ACA. Fast service and a great place to grab a coffee.
Spotless bathrooms.
